name: uqudo-webhook-relay
description: Relay: receives the Uqudo portal webhook (jwsResult), verifies and decodes the SDK result, maps it to the Uqudo_KYC_Data schema and forwards it to the Intuition Data API. Deployable to Vercel or self-hosted via Docker.

scripts.test: node test/mapper.test.js && node test/admin.test.js && node test/inbound-auth.test.js && node test/postgres.test.js && node test/mongo.test.js && node test/elasticsearch.test.js
scripts.test:pg: docker run --rm -d --name relay-pg-test -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=relay -e POSTGRES_USER=relay -e POSTGRES_DB=relay -p 55432:5432 postgres:16-alpine && sleep 5 && node test/postgres.test.js; docker rm -f relay-pg-test
scripts.test:mongo: docker run --rm -d --name relay-mongo-test -p 57017:27017 mongo:7 && sleep 4 && MONGO_URL=mongodb://127.0.0.1:57017/relaytest node test/mongo.test.js; docker rm -f relay-mongo-test
scripts.test:es: docker run --rm -d --name relay-es-test -p 59200:9200 -e discovery.type=single-node -e xpack.security.enabled=false -e ES_JAVA_OPTS='-Xms512m -Xmx512m' docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.15.0 && sleep 40 && ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://127.0.0.1:59200 node test/elasticsearch.test.js; docker rm -f relay-es-test
